The '''tri-fighter''', known colloquially by both its users and targets as the "'''Clutch'''", was an "[[Ugly/Legends|Ugly]]" [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] used by several parties. [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Leonia Tavira]] and her gang of [[Pirate/Legends|pirates]], the [[Invids]] used them. The [[Rebel privateer]] [[Urias Xhaxin]] had several of these fighters among other Uglies on board of his ship, the ''[[Free Lance]]'' at the time of the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]]. Clutches were also used as escort fighters when the population of [[Dubrillion/Legends|Dubrillon]] was evacuated to [[Dantooine/Legends|Dantooine]].

==Characteristics==
The Clutch consisted of a [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE/LN starfighter]] ball cockpit and [[Ion engine/Legends|ion engines]] and three triangular fins set 120° apart with one fin above the cockpit and two below. Windows were cut into the side of the ball cockpit to give the pilot a better field of vision. Clutches were slightly slower than [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wing fighters]] but more maneuverable, and also had an unusual, but convenient, layout of controls, featuring a couple of pedals used for cutting quick turns, and the thrust and repulsor throttles could be turned off by pulling their respective knobs out--which the starfighter was wired to read as compensating to halt the movement in question, rather than merely ceasing thrust. This allowed a pilot to kill his ship's movement with a quick yank and re-engage it just as quickly, possibly with a quick turn added in there to further shake attackers.

Unlike [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[TIE series/Legends|TIE Series]] starfighters, the Clutch had basic [[Deflector shield/Legends|shields]], granting it better survivability. Weaponry consisted of two [[Laser cannon/Legends|laser cannons]] mounted below the cockpit, similar to the TIE fighter. The Clutch also had an [[Ion cannon/Legends|ion cannon]] mounted on the tip of the top fin. The lower two fins served as landing gear.

Though Clutches were sometimes referred to as "tri-fighters", they were not to be confused with the earlier [[Droid tri-fighter/Legends|droid tri-fighters]] used by the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]] during the later years of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].
